title: VATIN Double Face Daffodil Satin Ribbon 10mm X 45m,Yellow Polyester Fabric Ribbon use for Bows Bouquet, Gift Wrapping, Floral Arrangement Wedding Decoration
features: 【SIZE】10mm wide ribbon, 45m continuous per spool without any splices, perfect for meeting all your creative needs.
【MATERIAL】Made from 100% polyester, this double-faced satin ribbon offers both durability and luxury.
【HIGH QUALITY】Glossy finish on both sides with an elegant shine, easy to tie into beautiful bows. Washable, non-shrink, and colorfast, ensuring high quality for all crafting and sewing projects.

【VERSATILE USES】Ideal for hair bows, gift wrapping, ribbon crafts, party decorations, scrapbooking, bottle decorations, baking crafts, flower arrangements, floral designs, baby showers, and all other crafting and sewing needs.
【VATIN COMMITMENT】VATIN is committed to providing high-quality products and exceptional service, making it a great choice for all your arts and crafts projects.
description: VATIN Double Faced Daffodil Polyester Satin Ribbon, 3/8” Wide, Continuous 50 Yards, Fabric Ribbon for Bows, Gift Wrapping, Floral Arrangements, and More
